item.name: Contoso.FieldService.SafetyInspectionGuardPlugin

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.20.090 Configure and management office apps and add-ins

item.businessLogic: On booking create for a hazardous work order, blocks the operation (throws InvalidPluginExecutionException) unless a con_safetyinspection with con_result = Pass or Pass with Conditions and con_signedoff = true exists for the work order.
